storefront.seoTitle: The White Mustang — American Emotion. Swiss Perfection.
storefront.seoDescription: Rent the white Ford Mustang GT 5.0 V8 Convertible for your wedding or an unforgettable weekend in the Swiss Alps.

hero.headline: Drive in Style.
hero.subheadline: The white Ford Mustang GT 5.0 V8 Convertible — for unforgettable weddings and Swiss Alpine weekends.

features.noTurbo: V8 naturally aspirated — no turbo, no supercharger
features.injection: Combined port and direct fuel injection
features.sound: Deep, aggressive V8 note all the way to 7,500 rpm
features.linear: Linear power delivery with zero turbo lag

gallery.heading: The Mustang
gallery.alt: The White Mustang GT 5.0 V8 Convertible

pricing.heading: Pricing & Availability
pricing.calendarNote: Click a date to send an inquiry. Prices may vary.

booking.heading: Request a Booking
booking.availabilityError: Live availability could not be loaded right now. You can still prepare your request.
booking.privacy: I agree that The White Mustang may use my details to process this booking request.

summary.label: Price Indication
summary.selectDates: Choose a start and return date for a non-binding price indication.

booking.success: Your reservation request has been received. We will be in touch shortly. Reference: {id}

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.datesRequired: Please choose a start and return date.
errors.pastDate: The start date cannot be in the past.
errors.dateOrder: The return date cannot be before the start date.
errors.submitFailed: The request could not be sent right now. Please try again.
errors.ageInvalid: Please enter a valid age between 18 and 120.

manage.seoDescription: Manage your reservation request for The White Mustang.
manage.heading: Manage Reservation
manage.paymentPending: Payment details will be communicated to you by email once your reservation is confirmed.
manage.contactEmailHint: For questions about your reservation, please contact us at
manage.cancelAllowed: You can cancel this reservation online until {days} days before the start date.
manage.cancelBlocked: This reservation can no longer be cancelled online. Please contact us directly.
manage.refundManual: Any applicable refund is reviewed and handled manually.

errors.loadFailed: This reservation could not be loaded. The link may have expired.
errors.cancelFailed: The reservation could not be cancelled. Please contact us directly.

footer.contact: Questions or special wishes? Get in touch:
footer.legal: © 2025 The White Mustang · thewhitemustang.ch · All rights reserved

login.seoDescription: Protected administration access for The White Mustang.
login.supporting: Protected access for bookings, calendar control, and operational workflows.
login.title: Admin Login
login.description: Sign in with your authorized Supabase admin account.
login.errorInvalid: The credentials could not be verified.
login.errorUnauthorized: This account is not enabled for admin access.
login.errorGeneric: Sign-in is not available right now. Please try again.

confirm.title: Confirm Reservation
confirm.description: The reservation will be confirmed and the customer will be notified by email. Payment and handover remain separate steps.
confirm.noteLabel: Internal note — not sent to customer (optional)

decline.title: Decline Reservation
decline.description: The request will be marked as declined and the customer will be notified by email.

detailModal.title: Booking Details
detailModal.noteError: The note could not be saved.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.dragHint: Click a date or drag across multiple days to block a period.
calendar.errorBlock: Could not block the date. Please try again.
calendar.errorUnblock: Could not unblock the date. Please try again.
